{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322191810714D3E93D5CE94B00BF1"}"},"total":405},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7558152924183544638","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"网球现实题材的，我第一次看到，非常新颖。男主角很有代入感，两年内就达到传奇球员的水平，崛起🉐非常快，完本得也非常快，果然是快船。

跟莎拉波娃怎么样后面就没有交代了，奥运会拿冠军后的举国同庆应该再写一点。不足的地方就是介绍网球的规则少了点，到了60%进度才解释了一下为什么有40分。网球的一局，一盘，一场比赛怎么计分这个确实复杂了点。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1759772144,"group_id":"7357904625254534206","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N51+Sg3yfLcHhOswDJfFCkA=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"5972244086","user_name":"米兰阿达达"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"5972244086","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7357904625254534206","book_info":{"abstract":"曾经是替身演员又是业余网球手的苏澈重返2006年，发现身上绑定了一个“文体转换”系统。
这是一个十分特别的系统，如果你想获得体育技能点，则必须在娱乐圈里做出一番成绩，或者引发巨大话题效应；如果你想提升自己的唱功和演技，必须在体育圈里获得巨大突破。
于是，苏澈不得不在文体两个圈子里来回横跳！
叮！苏澈的新歌领跑榜单，吊打一干天王天后，网球技能点+3；苏澈击败瑞士天王费德勒，红土之王纳达尔，唱功+3和演技+3。
终有一日，众明星：苏澈，你去打网球吧，给我们留口饭吃；网坛三巨头：兄弟，你去娱乐圈吧，给我们留个大满贯拿拿！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/c39b87ee6f15f39c8eee24536d25b05b","author":"江湖那么大","author_id":"","book_id":"7357904625254534206","book_name":"我，文体两开花，星中之星","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#402008","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3962人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":43,"name":"娱乐圈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=43&name=娱乐圈&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7357996331832459838","read_count":"3962","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"553847"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.6","serial_count":"270","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,重生,娱乐圈,直播","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/f294e98d8024aaa3e5e15b6998cbc83d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779362290&x-signature=6kGYryu4IkTWQtY2kNw1B5ehgSQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"95977639397","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"306"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322191810714D3E93D5CE94B00BF1"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读11小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwa
